impact: Browser-realistic local session tests cannot seed and clear the __Host-apoth_access cookie through the HTTP dev endpoint because host-prefixed cookies require Secure while the development route clears with secure=false. This can hide local browser regressions in session establishment/clearing; production secure behavior is likely unaffected but should be verified explicitly.
resolution: Resolved in T-087 by making /api/auth/session set and clear the __Host-apoth_access cookie with Secure=true in all environments, then verifying the real sign-out UI path clears a browser-seeded secure host cookie and restores protected-route redirects.
title: Dev session cookie uses __Host prefix without a browser-valid secure local flow
